signal-blue.note: Migrated via /impeccable colorize from the shadcn default oklch(0.546 0.245 262.881) to the brand's actual Deep Indigo Navy hex #112953. Same hue family as before (~260-263), so the drift was lightness/chroma, not hue.

headline.purpose: SectionHeader titles atop a panel (e.g. 设备, 收件箱).

body.purpose: Default UI text, descriptions, dialog copy.

mono.purpose: Peer IDs, pairing codes, hashes, transfer speeds — any literal machine value.

shadows.name: control-flat
shadows.purpose: Default resting shadow for buttons, inputs, outline variants.

shadows.name: glass-panel-shadow-light
shadows.purpose: Ambient shadow for full glass section shells, light mode.

shadows.name: glass-panel-shadow-dark
shadows.purpose: Ambient shadow for full glass section shells, dark mode.

shadows.name: glass-card-shadow-light
shadows.purpose: Lighter ambient shadow for nested glass cards/accents, light mode.

shadows.name: glass-highlight-rim
shadows.purpose: Top-edge rim light simulating glass catching light, light mode.

motion.name: aurora-drift
motion.purpose: Ambient WebGL background gradient; runs continuously, gated by IntersectionObserver + visibilitychange.

motion.name: reduced-motion-freeze
motion.value: renders a single static frame instead of looping
motion.purpose: prefers-reduced-motion fallback for the ambient background — texture stays, animation stops.

motion.name: control-transition
motion.purpose: Default hover/focus transition for buttons, inputs, switches.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default call-to-action button — Signal Blue fill, used sparingly per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.288 0.082 260.7); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); border: none; border-radius: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.288 0.082 260.7) 90%, white); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(112 112 112 / 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action — flat, bordered, the most-used non-primary button variant.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text field — hairline border, subtle focus ring, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.708 0 0); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(112 112 112 / 0.5); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped state indicator — connection status, transfer state.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: oklch(0.288 0.082 260.7); color: oklch(0.985 0 0); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Glass Section Shell
components.description: Signature structural container — the outer chrome for every page section (devices, inbox, transfer, settings tiles).
components.css: .ds-glass-panel { background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.58); backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(145%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(145%); border-radius: 24px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 18px 56px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.07), inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.84); } .ds-glass-panel-inner { color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

components.name: Pairing Code Cell
components.description: Single-digit chip for the 6-digit pairing code — the one place glass chrome and mono type meet directly.
components.css: .ds-pairing-cell { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 56px; height: 72px; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.64); backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(145%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(145%); border: 1px solid rgb(15 23 42 / 0.055); border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgb(255 255 255 / 0.58); font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); }

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle control — pill track, checked state fills Signal Blue.
components.css: .ds-switch { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; width: 32px; height: 18.4px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: oklch(0.97 0 0); padding: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-switch[data-checked='true'] { background: oklch(0.288 0.082 260.7); } .ds-switch-thumb { display: block; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(1 0 0); transform: translateX(2px); transition: transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-switch[data-checked='true'] .ds-switch-thumb { transform: translateX(15.6px); }

narrative.overview: SwarmDrop reads like a tool a developer would trust with their own files, not a consumer app trying to look friendly. The surface language is quiet by default — flat, restrained shadcn primitives (buttons, inputs, badges) with no bold color, no oversized type, no cheerful mascots — and it earns its personality from two deliberate layers on top: a glass chrome system that gives structural containers a soft, blurred depth without ever looking decorative, and a WebGL ambient background that gives the whole app a sense of a live network breathing behind the UI. Every piece of machine-truth renders in monospace with tabular numerals, never in the body sans.
keyCharacteristics: Flat, quiet shadcn primitives at the control level — restraint over decoration.
A separate glass-chrome vocabulary reserved for structural containers, never for buttons or inputs.
A single accent color used sparingly; the WebGL ambient background carries most of the 'alive' feeling.
Monospace + tabular-nums for every literal machine value — the honesty tell of the system.
Two distinct radius vocabularies: 6-14px for controls, 18-24px for panel chrome.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is the only saturated color allowed outside the ambient background layer.

rules.name: The Brand Fidelity Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is now the project's actual Deep Indigo Navy (#112953 / oklch(0.288 0.082 260.7), lifted to oklch(0.54 0.1 260.7) in dark mode for contrast). Migrated via /impeccable colorize from the shadcn default #155DFC. Treat this hex as the fixed brand anchor going forward.

rules.name: The Mono Truth Rule
rules.body: Anything that is a copy-able, verifiable, literal value renders in monospace with tabular-nums.

rules.name: The Flat-Control, Glass-Chrome Rule
rules.body: Clickable/typeable controls stay flat with shadow-xs; containers that hold other things get the glass treatment.

rules.name: The Reduced-Transparency Fallback
rules.body: Every glass surface ships a prefers-reduced-transparency fallback to a flat card background in the same commit it's introduced.

dos: Do keep every interactive control flat with shadow-xs only.
Do render every literal machine value in monospace with tabular-nums.
Do ship reduced-transparency and reduced-motion fallbacks alongside any new glass or WebGL surface.
Do treat Signal Blue as the only saturated UI accent.
Do use the two-radius system deliberately: 6-14px for controls, 18-24px for panel chrome.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no gradient hero blocks, no identical repeated card grids.
Don't build a heavy enterprise back-office: no dense grey-on-grey tables, no Windows-panel density.
Don't apply backdrop-filter to a button, input, or any control someone clicks or types into.
Don't add a second saturated accent color to the static UI chrome.
Don't re-derive or swap Signal Blue's hue — #112953 (light) / #4C6EA9 (dark) is the brand's actual hex, already migrated.
Don't add a persistent sidebar nav rail without checking against the current breadcrumb-only pattern first.
